routes.rationale: High-quality bilingual long-form landing/funnel copy — keep on Claude (brand voice + nuanced Arabic, low volume).
Balanced quality/cost; trial Gemma once eval'd.
Highest-volume path (WhatsApp bot) — Gemma 4 via OpenAI-compatible endpoint is ~10x cheaper, fast, self-hostable, Arabic-capable.

notes: Hybrid: Gemma 4 for high-volume/low-nuance (chatbot, qualification); Claude Sonnet/Fable for funnel copy. Chatbot routing lives in supabase/functions/whatsapp-webhook (env: GEMMA_API_KEY / GEMMA_BASE_URL / GEMMA_MODEL). Eval Gulf + Egyptian Arabic before flipping the bot.
